caption.text: New warm honey balayage by the amazing @chanel.honeyandsage 🫶🍯 I have spent over a year growing out all the damage my hair suffered from flat irons to bleach and I am so happy to be back to my natural color with a touch of 🍯 Thank you Chanel!!!

caption.text: I saw Wuthering Heights…I am a huge reader and love seeing books come to life on screen. What did you think of the most recent adaptation? Did you love it, hate it, or are you not planning to see it?
